zh.lifeSummary: 當María de la Cerda於1310年出生時，她的父親Fernando II de la Cerda y Castilla35歲，母親Juana Nunez "la palomilla" de Lara y Alvarez de Azagra Señora de Lerma, Villafranca, Dueñas, Fuente-Empudia, Torrelobatón and Herrera,25歲。她於大約1335年與Charles Comte d'Etampes, Comte d'Evreux在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌艾坦培斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1379年11月19日在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內沙吉亞可斯享年69歲，埋葬在法國崔英德沙吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当María de la Cerda于1310年出生时，她的父亲Fernando II de la Cerda y Castilla35岁，母亲Juana Nunez "la palomilla" de Lara y Alvarez de Azagra Señora de Lerma, Villafranca, Dueñas, Fuente-Empudia, Torrelobatón and Herrera,25岁。她于大约1335年与Charles Comte d'Etampes, Comte d'Evreux在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌艾坦培斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1379年11月19日在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內沙吉亞可斯享年69岁，埋葬在法国崔英德沙吉登尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Cerda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jesus, Francisco, Manuel, Juan, Luis, Ramon, Guadalupe, Ricardo, Miguel, Pedro, Carlos.

Spanish and Portuguese: from cerda ‘bristle, hair’ (from Late Latin cirra), apparently a nickname for someone with a prominent tuft of hair. One of the sons of King Alfonso X (1221–84) was known as Fernando de la Cerda.
Catalan (Cerdà): habitational name, cerdà, for someone from La Cerdanya, a Catalan district in the Pyrenees which is situated partly in Spain and partly in France. Compare Serda .

variants.name: Serda
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Agustin, Angel, Humberto, Juan, Lupe, Manuel, Reynaldo, Santos, Adela, Ana, Angelina, Bacilio.

nameMeanings.name: María
meanings: A name derived from Mapia, one of the Greek forms of Miriam. Maria is found as a male name as well as a female name. Viscount Montague, of Cowdray, Sussex, who succeeded to the title as second viscount, was christened Anthony Maria Browne. In Camden's Remains (p. 44), referred to in Delicie Literarise, occurs Thomas Maria Wingfield; and there was also a Sir Edward Maria Wingfield. The name appears to have been adopted in the latter family from Mary, daughter of Henry VIII. Compare Notes and Queries 5th S. ii. 73, 316, 478. Marie is frequently found as a male name in France and in other parts of the Continent.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Olaf  , also widely used in southwest Sweden.

en.lifeSummary: When María de la Cerda was born in 1310, her father, Fernando II de la Cerda y Castilla, was 35 and her mother, Juana Nunez "la palomilla" de Lara y Alvarez de Azagra Señora de Lerma, Villafranca, Dueñas, Fuente-Empudia, Torrelobatón and Herrera,, was 25. She married Charles Comte d'Etampes, Comte d'Evreux about 1335, in Étampes, Essonne, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 19 November 1379, in Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 69, and was buried in Saint-Denis, Indre, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque María de la Cerda est née en 1310, son père, Fernando II de la Cerda y Castilla, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Juana Nunez "la palomilla" de Lara y Alvarez de Azagra Señora de Lerma, Villafranca, Dueñas, Fuente-Empudia, Torrelobatón and Herrera,, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Charles Comte d'Etampes, Comte d'Evreux environ 1335, à Étampes, Essonne, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 19 novembre 1379, à Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Denis, Indre, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als María de la Cerda 1310 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fernando II de la Cerda y Castilla 35 und ihre Mutter Juana Nunez "la palomilla" de Lara y Alvarez de Azagra Señora de Lerma, Villafranca, Dueñas, Fuente-Empudia, Torrelobatón and Herrera, 25. Sie hat um 1335 in Étampes, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich Charles Comte d'Etampes, Comte d'Evreux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 19. November 1379 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Denis, Indre, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando María de la Cerda è nata il nel 1310, sua padre, Fernando II de la Cerda y Castilla, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Juana Nunez "la palomilla" de Lara y Alvarez de Azagra Señora de Lerma, Villafranca, Dueñas, Fuente-Empudia, Torrelobatón and Herrera,, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Charles Comte d'Etampes, Comte d'Evreux circa 1335, nel Étampes, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 19 novembre 1379, nel Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Denis, Indre, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: María de la Cerdaが1310年に生まれた時，父Fernando II de la Cerda y Castillaは35歳，母Juana Nunez "la palomilla" de Lara y Alvarez de Azagra Señora de Lerma, Villafranca, Dueñas, Fuente-Empudia, Torrelobatón and Herrera,は25歳であった。約1335年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンeタンペスでCharles Comte d'Etampes, Comte d'Evreuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1379年11月19日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンサイント-ジャククスで69歳で死去し，フランスセントアインダーサイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: María de la Cerda(이)가 1310년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fernando II de la Cerda y Castilla(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juana Nunez "la palomilla" de Lara y Alvarez de Azagra Señora de Lerma, Villafranca, Dueñas, Fuente-Empudia, Torrelobatón and Herrera,(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1335년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 e타프스에서 Charles Comte d'Etampes, Comte d'Evreux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1379년 11월 19일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 세인트-재c크스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 인드르 세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando María de la Cerda nasceu em 1310, seu pai, Fernando II de la Cerda y Castilla, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Juana Nunez "la palomilla" de Lara y Alvarez de Azagra Señora de Lerma, Villafranca, Dueñas, Fuente-Empudia, Torrelobatón and Herrera,, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Charles Comte d'Etampes, Comte d'Evreux aproximadamente 1335, em Étampes, Essonne, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1379, em Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Denis, Indre, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда María de la Cerda родилась в 1310 г., её отцу по имени Fernando II de la Cerda y Castilla было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Juana Nunez "la palomilla" de Lara y Alvarez de Azagra Señora de Lerma, Villafranca, Dueñas, Fuente-Empudia, Torrelobatón and Herrera,, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Charles Comte d'Etampes, Comte d'Evreux около 1335 г. в местности eтампесь, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 19 ноября 1379 г. в местности сеинт-джаккуесь, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-денис, индр, кентр, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando María de la Cerda nació en 1310, su papá, Fernando II de la Cerda y Castilla, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Juana Nunez "la palomilla" de Lara y Alvarez de Azagra Señora de Lerma, Villafranca, Dueñas, Fuente-Empudia, Torrelobatón and Herrera,, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Charles Comte d'Etampes, Comte d'Evreux aproximadamente 1335, en Étampes, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1379, en Saint-Jacques, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Denis, Indre, Centre, Francia.
